title: Category Executive – Sports Equipment
description:
About Us
Sports Fashion is a proud Singapore-based company with a longstanding presence in the local sporting goods scene. We operate well-established retail outlets in Queensway Shopping Centre and Peninsula Shopping Centre—two iconic destinations known to generations of sports enthusiasts. With deep roots in the community and a passion for performance gear, we focus on curating quality products in racket sports, running, and activewear. Whether in-store or online, we strive to serve our customers with expertise, authenticity, and a commitment to active living.

We’re looking for a driven and detail-oriented individual to manage the product range for racket sports and also support the distribution of these products to our retail partners and clients.

If you've worked as a retail manager, team leader, or sales supervisor in a sporting goods store and have a strong understanding of products and customer preferences, we welcome your application. This is an excellent opportunity to apply your frontline experience to product selection, supplier coordination, and backend operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Source and procure racket sports-related products (e.g. rackets, strings, grips, apparel, accessories) from both local and international suppliers.
  • Liaise with suppliers on pricing, timelines, and product selection, ensuring a competitive and well-curated assortment.
  • Track inventory levels and manage replenishment cycles for both B2C and B2B channels.
  • Maintain product listings and updates on platforms like Shopify; familiarity with marketplaces like Shopee or Lazada is a bonus.
  • Handle B2B sales and distribution of racket sports products to external retailers, partners, and institutional clients.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with wholesale accounts, ensuring timely fulfilment and clear communication.
  • Stay up to date with trends, customer preferences, and new product innovations within the racket sports space.

Requirements

  • Interest or background in racket sports, or general knowledge of sporting goods.
  • Strong communication and negotiation skills.
  • Previous experience in retail, procurement, sales, or merchandising preferred.
  • Comfortable working with suppliers and B2B clients.
  • Organised and proactive, with good attention to detail.
  • Familiarity with Excel, inventory systems, or e-commerce platforms is a plus.

What We Offer

  • Opportunities to shape the product range of a growing racket sports business.
  • A supportive and inclusive work culture.
  • Staff discounts on sports products.
  • On-the-job training and development opportunities.

We are an equal opportunity employer.
We are committed to fair and merit-based employment practices in line with TAFEP guidelines. All applications will be evaluated based on ability, experience, and fit for the role, regardless of age, race, gender, religion, marital status, or other personal attributes.

postedCompany.description: Sports Fashion Pte Ltd, has over seven decades' worth of specialty sporting goods knowledge. SFPL's multiple retail banners, including Weston Corp, Limited Edt, IRUN and more, have become familiar names for many Singaporean households, as it strives to continue to put Singapore on the sporting and fashion global map.
postedCompany.name: SPORTS FASHION PTE LTD
